title: heuchera americana var. americana
intro: Heuchera americana var. americana, also known as American alum root, is a perennial plant species native to North America, characterized by its lobed or deeply toothed leaves and tall, airy spikes of white flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been employed to treat various health conditions, including wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Heuchera americana var. americana include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Heuchera americana var. americana can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or salve, allowing for various forms of herbal administration.
